title: proechomai #4284
definition:
1) to have before or in advance of another, to have pre-eminence
    over another, to excel, surpass
 2) to surpass in excellencies which can be passed to one's credit
nasbUsage:

 2) to surpass in excellencies which can be passed to one's credit
